name: Flight Centre Travel Group Limited
analysis: FLT has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 27% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.5× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$11.9200, stop A$10.6524, target A$14.1259 (1.74:1) — then trail it.
